flags.message: CourtListener MCP server was unavailable for this cell: every tool call failed with a server-side 'REDIS_URL is not set; cannot access session store' error. The prediction proceeded on the provisioned inputs plus the committed statpack, per the degraded-upstream rule. If the error is config-side it likely affects every cell in this run.

The committed metrics/statpack.md has no 'Modern discretionary-cert petitions by disposition' section, though .github/prompts/predict.md tells cert predictors to anchor on it; only the blended overall/by-court cuts are present (SCOTUS: 296 resolved, granted 1.4%). Separately, citation-filtered `fedcourts query --court scotus` returned zero priors, so corpus retrieval contributed nothing for this modern cert cell.
